\tzpentry{ID3288}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3288 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega_{n \ell m} = \frac{v_A}{R} \sqrt{n^2 + \frac{ \ell( \ell+1)}{1 + \frac{R}{2 \delta_{skin}}}} \end{equation}
